Paving and Shading AD

Who We Are

Abu Dhabi #1 in Paving and Shade Structures

Founded in 2003, Abu Saifain is the UAE most trusted supplier of premium interlocking paving, kerbstones and custom shade structures.

  • ►Specialists in interlocking tiles - residential, commercial and government
  • ►Custom shade structures - pergolas, car shades and canopies
  • ►Full range: kerbstones, concrete slabs, blocks
  • ►Trusted by contractors and government entities across Abu Dhabi
Contact Our Team

Our Services

Complete Project Solutions

From supply to installation, we support every stage of your project across the UAE.

☰

Interlocking Paving

Premium tiles and kerbstones in all shapes, sizes and colours.

⛩

Shade Structures

Custom pergolas, parking shades and canopies built for Abu Dhabi sun.

🎨

Design Consultation

Expert help selecting the right products, patterns and colours.

🚚

UAE-Wide Delivery

On-time delivery to site across Abu Dhabi, Al Ain and Dubai.

🔬

Quality Assurance

All products tested to UAE standards.

🔨

Technical Support

On-site guidance ensuring installations meet the highest standards.
